title: Telanthophora chicharrensis
intro: There is no information available for the plant Telanthophora chicharrensis, and the information could not be verified.
taxonomy: Telanthophora chicharrensis is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is a part of the genus Telanthophora, which consists of flowering plants native to South America. The classification of Telanthophora chicharrensis is further detailed in the botanical classification system as a member of the tribe Mutisieae. Within the Mutisieae tribe, Telanthophora chicharrensis is closely related to other plant species native to the Andes mountain range. Further research is necessary to fully understand the specific classification of Telanthophora chicharrensis within the broader plant kingdom.
